steps.title: Set up the revenue equation and substitute
steps.content:
The carnival's total revenue equals \$10 per adult ticket plus \$5 per child ticket. This gives us:

$$10a + 5c = 4100$$

where $a$ = adult tickets and $c$ = child tickets. Since 220 adult tickets were sold:

$$10(220) + 5c = 4100$$

$$2200 + 5c = 4100$$

steps.title: Solve for child tickets
steps.content:
Subtract 2200 from both sides:

$$5c = 1900$$

Divide by 5:

$$c = 380$$

Therefore, 380 child admission tickets were sold.
